content.content:
23b40ca92 test: replace ad-hoc sin/sinf test functions with test_representative_100()
85eb345aa optimize: comprehensive RV32 soft-float libm assembly cleanup (-1022 bytes, -5.6%)
b70a1f3d3 optimize: frexpf remove dead callee-saved register saves
e44f2e6a6 optimize: eliminate dead code and inline CLZ in __gf_fpexlog
3af0e8d75 optimize: eliminate dead code and memory round-trips in hot helpers

3af0e8d75 optimize: eliminate dead code and memory round-trips in hot helpers

input.command:
cd /home/nick/work/picolibc_agentic && git add libm/machine/riscv/test/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
test: update representative test points for all 61 libm functions

Replaces ad-hoc test vectors with test_representative_100() coverage
across all float and double libm functions, consistent with the
pattern established for sin/sinf.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
